# mock_patient_profiles { #cdmconnector.mock_patient_profiles }

```python
mock_patient_profiles(number_individuals=100, seed=1, *, source='duckdb')
```

Create a minimal mock CDM for testing PatientProfiles (person, observation_period, cohort-like table).

For full OMOP mock use cdmconnector.eunomia (e.g. require_eunomia + cdm_from_con).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name               | Type        | Description                           | Default    |
|--------------------|-------------|---------------------------------------|------------|
| number_individuals | int         | Number of persons (default 100).      | `100`      |
| seed               | int or None | Random seed (default 1).              | `1`        |
| source             | str         | Backend ("duckdb"); default "duckdb". | `'duckdb'` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                    |
|--------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | Cdm    | CDM reference with person, observation_period, cohort1 tables. |
